title: Dettol Original Liquid Antiseptic Disinfectant for First Aid 750 ml
features: For first aid, medical and personal hygiene uses
Effective concentrated antiseptic solution that kills bacteria and protects against the germs
Use Dettol antiseptic liquid on cuts, scratches and insect bites to kill germs and protect against infection
Keep out of sight and reach of children
Do not use after expiry date printed on the bottle
description: Product Description Dettol liquid is an effective concentrated antiseptic solution that kills bacteria and protects against the germs which can cause infection and illness. It can be used for antiseptic cleansing of minor wounds caused by cuts, bites, grazes, insect stings, for dandruff, spots and pimples and if medically advised, for personal hygiene. It contains chloroxylenol. Ingredients Also contains Pine Oil, Isopropyl Alcohol, Castor Oil, Caustic Soda Solution, Caramel, Water Directions HOW TO USE DETTOL LIQUID. USE DILUTION & ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. FIRST AID AND MEDICAL: DO NOT USE UNDILUTED. Antiseptic wound cleansing for cuts, grazes, bites and stings. 50ml to 1 litre, 1 capful to half pint of water. Cover with clean, dry dressing. Midwifery. 25ml to 1 litre, 1 capful to 1 pint of water for external antisepsis. HOUSEHOLD: Nurseries. 50ml to 1 litre, 1 capful to half pint of water. Linen, Napkins, Handkerchiefs etc. 25ml to 1 litre, 3 capfuls to 1 half gallon of water. Lavatories, sinks (not acrylic), drains, bins. Use undiluted Dettol Liquid. Acrylic materials e.g. baths. 25ml to 1 litre, 7 capfuls to 1 gallon of water. Floors and hard surfaces. 25ml to 1 litre, 7 capfuls to 1 gallon of water. PERSONAL HYGIENE. NOT FOR ECZEMATOUS CONDITIONS. DO NOT USE UNDILUTED. Bathing. 1-2 capfuls to bath water. Dandruff. 25ml to 1 litre, 1 capful to 1 pint of warm water. Pour over scalp, leave for 10 minutes before shampooing. Spots and Pimples. 50ml to 1 litre, 1 capful to 1 pint of warm water. Bathe affected area daily. FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY. If swallowed, wash out mouth and drink plenty of water or milk. If contact is made with eyes, wash thoroughly with cold water. In both cases consult your doctor and take this bottle with you. Do not use after expiry date printed on bottle. Not recommended for use around cats. Safety Warning KEEP OUT OF REACH AND SIGHT OF CHILDREN. Box Contains Dettol See more
